proposals.summary: Replace static size-class model with dynamic slab-based allocation in spec
proposals.spec_text: 1 to 32 fixed extent size classes, configurable at initialization, up to 10M slots per class
proposals.proposed_text: System MUST support dynamic slab-based allocation. At initialization, the caller specifies total managed space and slab size. Size classes are allocated on-demand. Max 256 slabs. Valid sizes: 128 KiB to 5 MiB, multiples of 4 KiB.

proposals.summary: Update capacity criterion from 32 classes/10M slots to 256 slabs model
proposals.spec_text: At least 32 distinct size classes with up to 10,000,000 slots per class
proposals.proposed_text: The system supports up to 256 dynamically allocated slabs across any mix of size classes. Each 1 GiB slab provides approximately 262,000 slots.

proposals.summary: Logger receptacle declared but unused; type mismatch prevents binding

options.A: Remove logger receptacle from component and spec (backfill)
options.B: Implement logging and fix ILogger type mismatch (align)

questions: Is diagnostic logging needed in the extent manager?
Should the project unify ILogger into one definition?

proposals.summary: No public iteration API exists; open() rebuilds index internally

options.B: Defer/remove from spec since open() handles index rebuilding (backfill)

questions: Do any consumers need to iterate extents via public API?
Is open() recovery path sufficient for index rebuilding?

proposals.summary: Reframe iteration performance as open() startup performance
proposals.spec_text: Iteration performance MUST be sufficient for rebuilding in-memory indexes at startup
proposals.proposed_text: The open() operation MUST rebuild the in-memory extent index by scanning all slab bitmaps and reading valid records. Performance MUST be sufficient for startup of volumes with up to 256 slabs.

proposals.summary: Acknowledge logger not bound to extent manager (doesn't use it)
proposals.spec_text: Wire full component stack: Logger, SPDKEnv, BlockDeviceSpdkNvme, ExtentManagerComponentV1
proposals.proposed_text: Wire component stack: SPDKEnv, BlockDeviceSpdkNvme, ExtentManagerComponentV1. Logger bound to SPDKEnv and BlockDeviceSpdkNvme only.

proposals.summary: Revise linear-scaling claim for sub-microsecond lookups
proposals.spec_text: N threads complete approximately N times faster for lookup operations
proposals.proposed_text: N threads each process their share concurrently. I/O-bound ops (create, remove) show throughput improvement; in-memory ops (lookup) remain sub-microsecond regardless of thread count.

proposals.summary: Update entities, edge cases, and assumptions to reflect slab model
changes: Replace edge cases referencing 32 classes/10M slots
